scripts.generate:grpc: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('src/generated', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.mkdirSync('src/generated', { recursive: true });" && grpc_tools_node_protoc -I ../TechConf.Grpc.Server/Protos --plugin=protoc-gen-ts_proto=./node_modules/.bin/protoc-gen-ts_proto --ts_proto_out=src/generated --ts_proto_opt=env=browser,esModuleInterop=true,outputClientImpl=grpc-web,useOptionals=none ../TechConf.Grpc.Server/Protos/event.proto
scripts.build: npm run generate:grpc && tsc -b && vite build
